author: @gnukeith
text: I would rather write code on a piece of paper and hand deliver it to the cloud than use Xcode, also since when was Xcode open source? I don't remember it ever being open source https://t.co/6Xv86bmnzC

included.text:
this is all you need on a mac in 2026

> zen browser
> cmux (claude & codex)
> xcode
> recordly

(all 100% free and open source) https://t.co/OK8IfMig87
